title: polemonium micranthum
intro: Polemonium micranthum, also known as Chinese Jacob's-ladder, is a plant species in the borage family native to China and the Himalayas. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of Polemonium micranthum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
